title: Sour Tender Show-off Portuguese Chicken Stir-fry
description: A low-carb-friendly sour and tender show-off Portuguese chicken dish featuring green salsa and tandoor flavors.

ingredients.name: rice vinegar
ingredients.notes: preferably aged rice vinegar for best sourness and depth of flavor

ingredients.name: soy sauce or low-sodium soy sauce

instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Season the chicken with white pepper powder and soy sauce.
Place the seasoned chicken in the skillet, cooking until golden brown on both sides (about 3-4 minutes per side).
Add green chilis, tamarind paste or juice, rice vinegar, and a pinch of salt to the skillet. Stir well until the mixture forms a syrup-like consistency.
Reduce heat to medium-low and continue stirring for an additional minute, allowing flavors to meld together.
Remove from heat and garnish with finely chopped green onions before serving.
